ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver profile */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_history" TEXT /* Summary of the driver's history (e.g., clean record, one speeding violation) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State where the driver's license was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium rate */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company offering the rate */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver profile associated with the rate */,
  "premium_rate" REAL /* Premium rate amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the premium rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the premium rate expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeding_violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speeding violation */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver profile associated with the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date the violation occurred */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit of the road where the violation occurred */,
  "actual_speed" INTEGER /* Actual speed of the driver at the time of the violation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the violation occurred */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount paid for the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeding_violations_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver profile associated with the accident */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date the accident occurred */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the accident occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duis" (
  "dui_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DUI incident */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver profile associated with the DUI */,
  "dui_date" TEXT /* Date the DUI occurred */,
  "blood_alcohol_level" REAL /* Blood alcohol level of the driver at the time of the DUI */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the DUI occurred */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount paid for the DUI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dui_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duis_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_company_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company the representative works for */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_company_representatives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_profile_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver profile updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update occurred */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_profile_updates_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rate_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the premium rate updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update occurred */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_updates_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES premium_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_activity_log" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES insurance_company_representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES data_analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rate_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company making the request */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver profile associated with the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_requests_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_requests_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_severity_levels" (
  "severity_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_incident_types" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "incident_type_id")
)
